hero.subtitle: Choose from a diverse menu featuring a delectable array of dishes crafted with the finest ingredients and culinary expertise. Our mission is to satisfy your cravings and elevate your dining experience, one delicious meal at a time.

1.name: Margherita Pizza
1.desc: Classic Italian pizza with fresh tomato sauce and mozzarella.

2.name: Pepperoni Pizza
2.desc: Loaded with pepperoni and melted cheese.

3.name: Hawaiian Pizza
3.desc: Pizza with ham, pineapple, and mozzarella cheese.

4.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
4.desc: Grilled chicken with BBQ sauce and red onions.

5.name: Creamy Pasta
5.desc: Pasta with creamy mushroom sauce and parmesan.

6.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
6.desc: Classic Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, and bacon.

7.name: Penne Arrabbiata
7.desc: Spicy pasta with tomato sauce and red chili peppers.

8.name: Lasagna
8.desc: Layered pasta with meat sauce, cheese, and béchamel.

9.name: Classic Burger
9.desc: Juicy beef patty with lettuce, tomato, and special sauce.

10.name: Cheese Burger
10.desc: Classic burger with melted cheddar cheese.

11.name: Chicken Burger
11.desc: Grilled chicken breast with mayo and fresh vegetables.

12.name: Double Burger
12.desc: Two beef patties with double cheese and bacon.

13.name: Chocolate Cake
13.desc: Rich chocolate cake with creamy frosting.

14.name: Tiramisu
14.desc: Classic Italian dessert with coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone.

15.name: Ice Cream Sundae
15.desc: Vanilla ice cream with chocolate sauce and toppings.

services.subtitle: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.desc: We work to meet market needs with the highest standards of quality and safety.

1.title: Trusted Over the Years
1.description: Our success is built on the trust of our clients in our products and services for decades.

2.title: Local & Imported Products
2.description: We provide a wide range of high-quality local and imported products from top brands.

3.title: Wholesale & Distribution
3.description: Reliable and fast distribution services for markets and restaurants nationwide.

4.title: Easy & Fast Communication
4.description: We ensure quick response and smooth communication through multiple channels.

branches.subtitle: Our Locations
branches.title: Our Branches
branches.desc: Visit any of our branches and enjoy the same quality everywhere.

1.address: Nasr City, Abbas El Akkad Street

about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Tomato Restaurant was founded with a simple idea: to serve delicious food made from fresh ingredients and real passion. What started as a small kitchen has grown into a place where people come together to enjoy unforgettable flavors.
about.p2: Every dish we prepare tells a story of quality, care, and love for cooking. From classic recipes to modern creations, our chefs work tirelessly to bring you an authentic dining experience that feels just like home.

footer.tagline: Tomato Restaurant delivers fresh, delicious meals crafted with passion and the finest ingredients. Taste the difference.
